docs.name: Typewriter Text
docs.description: Character-by-character typing with blinking cursor, configurable speed, and delete-retype loop.

props.name: theme
props.description: Visual theme; light or dark. Default: dark.

props.name: words
props.description: An array of words or phrases to be typed out sequentially.

props.name: className
props.description: Add CSS classes to the text container.

props.name: cursorClassName
props.description: Add CSS classes to customize the blinking cursor span.

props.name: typingSpeed
props.description: Delay in milliseconds between typing each character.

props.name: deletingSpeed
props.description: Delay in milliseconds between deleting each character.

props.name: delayBetweenWords
props.description: Pause duration before erasing a completed word to type the next.

props.name: loop
props.description: Whether the typewriter sequence should repeat infinitely.

props.name: cursor
props.description: Controls the visibility of the blinking cursor at the end of the text.

docs.overview: TypewriterText cycles through an array of words with a smooth typing and erasing animation. It's great for hero headings that need to convey multiple value propositions without cluttering the layout.

scenarios.title: Hero headline rotator
scenarios.description: Swap your hero subtitle or adjective with a typewriter that cycles through your key benefits.

scenarios.title: Loading / processing indicator
scenarios.description: Use a single looping word to hint that background work is in progress.

scenarios.title: Feature tagline in a navbar
scenarios.description: Animate a short tagline beside your logo to keep visitors engaged right from the header.
